title: Working Directory Management with fchdir and getcwd
description: A flowchart demonstrating the interaction between a process, file descriptors, and directory paths using fchdir and getcwd functions, including the special case of device files.
relationships: Process calls open() on a directory to get a file descriptor (fd)
Process passes fd to fchdir() to change its current working directory
New CWD is set inside the kernel
Process calls getcwd() to retrieve the absolute path of the new CWD
If CWD is a device file path, it is treated as a namespace entry, not a data file
